# programs.tmux

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.tmux`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.tmux.aggressiveResize` | `boolean` | Resize the window to the size of the smallest session for which it is the current window. |
| `programs.tmux.baseIndex` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Base index for windows and panes. |
| `programs.tmux.clock24` | `boolean` | Use 24 hour clock. |
| `programs.tmux.customPaneNavigationAndResize` | `boolean` | Override the hjkl and HJKL bindings for pane navigation and resizing in VI mode. |
| `programs.tmux.disableConfirmationPrompt` | `boolean` | Disable confirmation prompt before killing a pane or window |
| `programs.tmux.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable tmux. |
| `programs.tmux.escapeTime` | `unsigned integer, meaning >=0` | Time in milliseconds for which tmux waits after an escape is input. |
| `programs.tmux.extraConfig` | `strings concatenated with "\n"` | Additional configuration to add to {file}`tmux.conf`. |
| `programs.tmux.focusEvents` | `boolean` | On supported terminals, request focus events and pass them through to applications running in tmux. |
| `programs.tmux.historyLimit` | `positive integer, meaning >0` | Maximum number of lines held in window history. |
| `programs.tmux.keyMode` | `one of "emacs", "vi"` | VI or Emacs style shortcuts. |
| `programs.tmux.mouse` | `boolean` | Whether to enable mouse support. |
| `programs.tmux.newSession` | `boolean` | Automatically spawn a session if trying to attach and none are running. |
| `programs.tmux.package` | `null or package` | The tmux package to use. |
| `programs.tmux.plugins` | `list of plugin packages or submodules` | List of tmux plugins to be included at the end of your tmux configuration. The sensible plugin, however, is defaulted to run at the top of your configuration. |
| `programs.tmux.prefix` | `null or string` | Set the prefix key. Overrules the "shortcut" option when set. |
| `programs.tmux.resizeAmount` | `positive integer, meaning >0` | Number of lines/columns when resizing. |
| `programs.tmux.reverseSplit` | `boolean` | Reverse the window split shortcuts. |
| `programs.tmux.secureSocket` | `boolean` | Store tmux socket under {file}`/run`, which is more secure than {file}`/tmp`, but as a downside it doesn't survive user logout. |
| `programs.tmux.sensibleOnTop` | `boolean` | Run the sensible plugin at the top of the configuration. It is possible to override the sensible settings using the {option}`programs.tmux.extraConfig` option. |
| `programs.tmux.shell` | `null or string` | Set the default-shell tmux variable. |
| `programs.tmux.shortcut` | `string` | CTRL following by this key is used as the main shortcut. |
| `programs.tmux.terminal` | `string` | Set the $TERM variable. |
| `programs.tmux.tmuxinator.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable tmuxinator. |
| `programs.tmux.tmuxinator.package` | `null or package` | The tmuxinator package to use. |
| `programs.tmux.tmuxinator.projects` | `attribute set of (YAML 1.1 value)` | Tmuxinator projects to write to {file}`$HOME/.config/tmuxinator`. One project configuration file is generated per attribute. See <https://github.com/tmuxinator/tmuxinator> for the project configuration format. |
| `programs.tmux.tmuxp.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable tmuxp. |
